text: SBI PSU Direct Plan Growth is a Equity mutual fund scheme from SBI Mutual Fund with a risk level rated as Very High. Latest NAV as of 2026-04-24 is ₹40.34.

1Y returns: 17.60%. 3Y annualised returns: 33.86%. 5Y annualised returns: 29.95%. Since inception returns: 3.93%. Compared with category 1Y average 5.81%. category 3Y average 28.28%. category 5Y average 29.79%.
Risk level: Very High. Standard deviation: 22.62. Sharpe ratio: 1.04. Alpha: 1.10. Beta: 0.94.

Expense ratio is 0.85%. Exit load policy: Exit load of 0.50% if redeemed within 30 days. Minimum SIP investment is ₹500. Minimum lump-sum investment is ₹5000. Taxation: Returns are taxed at 20%, if you redeem before one year. After 1 year, you are required to pay LTCG tax of 12.5% on returns of Rs 1.25 lakh+ in a financial year.
